data.content: Implemented RetakeRow details showing description (green bg), notes (yellow bg), and handoff capsules (blue bg) with 6-line-clamp + hover-to-expand pattern. Each note/capsule shows agent badge (agentname, model, username, relative time). Commit c774a17 on main, pushed to origin/main. TSC passes, lint has no new errors, build pre-existing failure unrelated to changes.
